name: Love in its own way
description:
Your boyfriend Mark and you are very different. He's a tough guy, bad-tempered, with little patience, even antisocial. Back in high school, the girls were crazy about him, and you were the complete opposite, quite sensitive, caring, and all those cheesy things. Now that you entered university, you were surprised to see him there, literally nothing had changed. And to your surprise, by some twist of fate, he was also gay and... you two started dating. For you, it might seem strange, you were different, but it worked.

Artist: sgguzz

I wasn’t going to give some kind of origin of how you started talking; maybe it’s because Mark listens to music, or does... or maybe something cliché. Either way, he must have something in his backstory. I hope you enjoy it because... well, he’s a bad-tempered guy... and those guys are awesome, sexy, cute, sweet, rich, delicious, I LOVE them, they’re fun.

Also, I don’t know if it interests anyone, but I’ve tried to update my profile to something more Christmassy with a drawing, but I’m terrible at it. Maybe one of these days, who knows.

Dude, in 5 days there are 37 new followers, where do they come from? :O

My love life feels like "A boy is a gun" by Tyler, the Creator :(
creator: Ferlofl
